title: Line Up Song
lyrics: Line up, line up, stand in a row!
Hands on your side, ready to go!
Eyes on me, back straight and tall!
We're ready to learn — one and all!

title: Say It Right Song
lyrics: Say it right, say it clear!
Listen close, the word is here!
One more time — say it loud!
Say it right and be so proud!

title: Copy Me Song
lyrics: Watch me first, then you do!
Copy me — through and through!
Eyes up here, do what I say!
You'll get it right today!

title: Act It Out Song
lyrics: Act it out, show me now!
You know the words — show me how!
Your turn to speak, your turn to try!
Stand up tall and reach the sky!

title: Good Job Song
lyrics: Good job today, you did so well!
You learned a lot — can you tell?
Pack your things and line up right!
See you next class — day or night!

title: Let's Go Song
lyrics: Let's GO! Let's GO! Wake up right now!
Jump up high and take a bow!
Shake your hands, stomp your feet!
English class — can't be beat!

title: Run Away Song
lyrics: Run away from the scary word!
Say it fast — have you heard?
Shout it out! Don't be shy!
Words can fly — oh my oh my!

title: Find It Song
lyrics: Find it! Find it! Look around!
Where's the word? Can it be found?
Check up high and check down low!
Found it — GO! GO! GO!

title: Crazy Game Song
lyrics: Crazy game — here we go!
Fast or slow? Yes or no?
Jump and spin and shout it out!
That's what English class is about!

title: High Five Song
lyrics: High five! High five! We did it today!
Best class ever — HEY HEY HEY!
Give a high five to your friend!
See you next time — till the end!

title: Hello Calm Song
lyrics: Hello, hello, it's a good day!
Take a breath and let's say hey!
Quiet hands, quiet feet!
Ready now — let's take a seat!

title: Look and Say Song
lyrics: Look at the word, take your time!
Say it softly — it's just fine!
No rush at all, nice and slow!
Look and say — now you know!

title: Try Again Song
lyrics: Try again, it's okay!
Everyone learns day by day!
You can do it, yes you can!
Try again — that's the plan!

title: Easy Game Song
lyrics: Easy game, nice and slow!
Take a turn and off you go!
No big rush, we all can play!
Easy game — yay yay yay!

title: Good Bye Calm Song
lyrics: Goodbye, goodbye, it's time to go!
You did so well — did you know?
Pack your bag and wave to me!
See you next time — happily!

title: Hello Friend Song
lyrics: Hello friend, how are you today?
I'm so glad that you came to play!
Let's learn together, you and me!
Best of friends — happy and free!

title: I Like It Song
lyrics: I like it! I like it a lot!
Say the word — give it a shot!
If you like it, shout it out!
That's what learning is about!

title: Together Song
lyrics: Together we can do this thing!
Listen to the words I sing!
Watch me first then do it too!
Together — me and you!

title: Team Song
lyrics: Team! Team! We're the best!
Work together — pass the test!
Help your friend and take a turn!
Together we can always learn!

title: Best Friend Song
lyrics: Best friend, best friend — that is you!
Thank you for everything you do!
See you next time, don't forget!
Best class friends — the best one yet!

title: Hello Routine Song
lyrics: Hello hello — it's our routine!
Best English class you've ever seen!
Sit down, look up, clap one two three!
Same as always — let's begin!

title: Daily Words Song
lyrics: Daily words, time to review!
Yesterday's words — do you know them too?
Say them once, say them twice!
Daily words — oh so nice!

title: Repeat After Me Song
lyrics: Repeat after me — say it right!
We practice every day and night!
One more time — loud and clear!
Repeat after me — right here!

title: Routine Game Song
lyrics: Routine game — you know the rules!
Same as always — use your tools!
Step by step, we play the game!
Every class — it's always the same!

title: See You Tomorrow Song
lyrics: See you tomorrow — same time, same place!
Put on your smile and show your face!
Pack your bag the same way today!
See you tomorrow — hip hip hooray!
